name: Cabag leather handbag
description:
Elevate your daily rotation with this vibrant Hermès Cabag tote in the house’s signature "Orange H" colour. Crafted from durable Toile (canvas) and trimmed with natural Vache Hunter leather, this bag perfectly balances luxury with functionality.

The standout feature of the Cabag is its dual handle system: it features two shorter leather handles for hand-carrying and two longer straps that allow it to be worn comfortably over the shoulder.

Ref: 503000426
Made In: France
Year: 2015
Comes with: Original Dust Bag
Type: Handbag, Shoulder Bag
Colour: Orange
Material: Calfskin Leather

Height: 22cm
Width: 40cm
Depth: 13cm
Strap length: 10cm(shorter strap), 24cm(longer strap)

Condition:
~The exterior is in good condition with normal signs of use. There are some stains and creases on the leather. 
~The interior is in good condition with normal signs of use. 
~ Hardware is in good condition with normal signs of use. 
~ The corners are in good condition with normal signs of use. 

Overall this bag is in good pre-owned condition. Please review all photos carefully for condition details.
